title: Hamilton rule idea
script_summary: A concise explanation of Hamilton's rule and its implications in biology.

segments.voiceover: What if your genes could influence the survival of your family?
This is Hamilton's rule, a fascinating concept in biology!
It suggests that an organism will behave altruistically if the benefit to relatives, weighted by the degree of genetic relatedness, exceeds the cost to itself.
For example, bees sacrifice themselves to protect their hive. Why? Because they're closely related!
But remember, this rule isn't infallible. Nature's complex, and exceptions exist!
Curious to learn more about the mysteries of nature? Hit that follow button!
